title: Verify Activated Extension Appears in Active Filter Tab

actions.description: Log in using admin@example.com and admin123 from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the extensions admin page
actions.description: Navigate to the extensions admin page

actions.instruction: Verify an element with selector `.active-extension-card` is visible in the filtered list
actions.description: Verify the activated extension card is visible in the filtered list

actions.instruction: Verify the badge count on the "Active" tab includes this extension
actions.description: Verify the badge count on the 'Active' tab includes the activated extension
